Test Case Title: Verify that login fails when the password contains leading spaces
Test Steps:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid username 
3- enter valid password with leading spaces
4- click login button
Expected Result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard page

Test Case Title: Verify that "Forgot your password" button is and displayed in the login page under login button
Test Steps:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- observe the position of  "Forgot your password" button
Expected Result: "Forgot your password" button is displayed in the login page under login button

Test Case Title: Verify that user is redirected to reset password page after clicking on the  "Forgot your password" button
Test Steps:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- observe the position of  "Forgot your password" button
3- click on  "Forgot your password" button
Expected Result: user is redirected to reset password page

Test Case Title: Verify appearing "Please enter your username to identify your account to reset your password" message  after redirecting to reset password page
Test Steps:
1- click on  "Forgot your password" button
2- observe appearing the mentioned message
Expected Result: Please enter your username to identify your account to reset your password" message is displayed

Test Case Title: Verify that user can reset password when providing valid username
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page
Test Steps:
1- enter valid username
2- click on reset password button
Expected Result: a confirmation reset password message is displayed "Reset Password link sent successfully"

Test Case Title: Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed when providing invalid username
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page
Test Steps:
1- enter invalid username
2- click on reset password button
Expected Result: system shows error message "username not found"

Test Case Title: Verify that user is redirected to login page after clicking on the cancel button
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page
Expected Result: user is redirected to login page

Test Case Title: Verify an error message is displayed when leaving username field empty
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page

Test Case Title: Verify system trims spaces in username field
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page
Test Steps:
1- enter username with leading / trailing spaces
2- click reset password button
Expected Result: System trims spaces and processes request successfully

Test Case Title: Verify system behavior when entering special characters in username field
Pre-conditions: user is on reset password page
Test Steps:
1- enter username with special characters
2- click reset password button
Expected Result: system shows error message "username not found"
